name: Honey Devil's Food Cake with Rich Chocolate Frosting -NHB
recipeInstructions:
To prepare cake: Grease and flour two 9-inch cake pans. In a large bowl, combine the flour, 1 cup of cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. Add 1-1/2 cups of honey, milk, oil, eggs, and 2 teaspoons of vanilla; beat for 2 minutes. Gradually beat in water. Divide batter between pans. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until sides pull away slightly from the pan and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 10 minutes. Turn onto wire racks and cool completely.
To prepare frosting: In a medium bowl, combine the remaining 1/2 cup of cocoa powder, 1/2 cup of honey, 1 teaspoon of vanilla, and cream. Beat until just thick and fluffy. To assemble, spread frosting evenly over sides and top of one cake layer. Place second cake layer on top. Spread remaining frosting evenly over sides and top.
[Makes 12 servings. Nutrients Per Serving: Calories: 422 Sodium: 368 mg Carbohydrates: 65.5 g Protein: 5.68 g Cholesterol: 63.4 mg Dietary Fiber: 4.20 g Total Fat: 19.0 g Cal. from Fat: 38%]
